data.content:
Branch: worktree-knots-8f7d-lease-lifecycle
Commit: b028f0549e7bb685ad590e7bf52f0929b9b394da
Summary: Tightened lease enforcement so claim requires external leases in lease_ready and activates them atomically; next now requires the matching lease id for bound leases and terminates/clears the lease on success.
Validation: make sanity passed, including full tests and 95.07% coverage.
